name: Okta: Stale Privileged Users (Direct)
description: Finds user accounts that have not logged in for at least 180 days and directly hold privileged role assignments.
query:
MATCH path = (user:Okta_User)-[:Okta_HasRoleAssignment]->(:Okta_RoleAssignment)-[:Okta_ScopedTo]->(:Okta)
WHERE user.lastLogin IS NULL OR datetime(user.lastLogin) <= datetime() - duration("P180D")
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
